name: GH_RuleResult
summary: Enumerates the possible opinions a rule can have.

enum_values.name: NoOpinion
enum_values.summary: The rule does not prohibit or enforce any behaviour.

enum_values.name: Include
enum_values.summary: The rule claims a certain index ought to be included.

enum_values.name: Exclude
enum_values.summary: The rule claims a certain index ought to be exluded.
